vehicle.cab_type: high roof sleeper (explicit high roof, possible sleeper cab)

composition.truck_orientation: facing directly forward, perpendicular to photo plane
composition.important_crop_information: entire cab is visible left-to-right and top-to-bottom, none of the main cab is cropped

company_identity.position: center front, middle section of cab, horizontal orientation
company_identity.appearance: blue capital letters 'R-A-S', black capital letters 'HAULAGE', separated but together as a compound logo

owner_signatures.position: front lower grille trim, center, script font
front bumper, center, below grille, yellow text on black background

grille_lights.position: upper section of grille, horizontal row

main_headlights.position: front, left and right extremes, integrated into cab design

windshield_contents: windshield sunstrip text: 'Have Fun A Good Time Work Long Time', horizontal, white script

front_geometry.grille_description: large black central grille, vertically stacked, segmented horizontally by visible trim, Renault chrome logo centered
front_geometry.headlight_description: rectangular with amber LED strip above main lamp cluster, complex side segment
front_geometry.bumper_description: deep blue with white accents, contour-molded, two groups of lights each side, custom name plate centered
